title: Compliance orchestrator (compliance.ts)
acceptance_criteria: Export `runComplianceModules(crawl: CrawlResult, ctx: ComplianceContext): ComplianceResult` mirroring the structural pattern of modules/accessibility.ts / seo.ts
Invoke p5-01..p5-06; isolate each module in its own try/catch so one module failure cannot abort the group (logger.error, continue)
Aggregate findings + build the NON-numeric frameworkSummary (GDPR/CCPA/WCAG headings → signal label + status observed|not-observed|not-evaluated). No score, no fraction, no pass-count
Pure orchestration over passed-in crawl/ctx — NO new outbound request
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
